patches.title: Check Transformation Site First
patches.trigger: The task requires cleaning, heating, or cooling an object, and the object is not immediately visible in the current observation.
action_flow: Identify the relevant transformation site: sink for cleaning, microwave/stove for heating, fridge for cooling.
Navigate directly to that site and check if the target object is present (e.g., dirty pan in sink, apple on counter near microwave, cold item in fridge).
If the object is found at the transformation site, pick it up immediately.
If the object is not found, proceed to a systematic container search using object-specific location priors (e.g., check cabinets, drawers, shelves).
avoid: Starting with random containers or exploring irrelevant areas before checking the transformation site.
Assuming the object is never at the transformation site and skipping that check.
Going to the transformation site after already acquiring the object (that is a later step).
patches.principle: The task requires cleaning, heating, or cooling an object, and the object is not immediately visible in the current observation..
